member_descriptions.name: imageEdit_nano_banana2
member_descriptions.description: API image editing/generation via Nano-Banana 2. Up to 6 reference images + text prompt -> 1 image output. Edits images while maintaining subject consistency, or uses references as style guides for new image generation.

member_descriptions.name: styletransfer_NanoBananaPro
member_descriptions.description: Local style transfer FOR FULL BODY SHOTS via Nano-Banana Pro (Gemini). 1 video (layout reference) + 7 images (style + hero elements) -> 2 image outputs. Transfers the style reference onto the first video frame while integrating the look of hero element references.

member_descriptions.name: Kling3_multiShot
member_descriptions.description: API multi-shot storyboard video via Kling 3.0 (kling-v3). 1 input image (start frame, LoadImage node) -> 1 video output (VHS_VideoCombine). Generates 1-6 sequential shots in a single generation: each shot has its own text prompt (max 512 chars) and duration set directly on the KlingVideoNode. Use for storyboards, scene sequences, and narrative clips with multiple camera cuts. Prompts go into multi_shot.storyboard_N_prompt inputs; multi_shot must match shot count exactly (e.g. '3 storyboards'). Aspect ratio defaults to 16:9, resolution to 720p - override only on explicit user request.

user_intent.when_to_use: Use to generate a video using Kling.
example_requests: build a video workflow using Kling
generate a video using Kling

models.description: API multi-shot storyboard video via Kling 3.0 (kling-v3). 1 input image (start frame, LoadImage node) -> 1 video output (VHS_VideoCombine). Generates 1-6 sequential shots in a single generation: each shot has its own text prompt (max 512 chars) and duration set directly on the KlingVideoNode. Use for storyboards, scene sequences, and narrative clips with multiple camera cuts. Prompts go into multi_shot.storyboard_N_prompt inputs; multi_shot must match shot count exactly (e.g. '3 storyboards'). Aspect ratio defaults to 16:9, resolution to 720p - override only on explicit user request.
models.param_variability: single member - no cross-member variability to report

member_descriptions.name: acescg_to_srgb
member_descriptions.description: [Local] OCIO color convert. 1 EXR (or PNG) in -> 1 PNG out. Loads via bepic_imageLoad (OIIO), applies bepic_colorTransform input ACES - ACEScg to output Output - sRGB with clamp on, saves 16-bit PNG via bEpic_imageSave (OIIO). For batches of non-contiguous frames, run one job per file and patch image_path + first_frame; keep auto_version false so saves go straight into the target folder.

user_intent.when_to_use: Use to generate an image.
example_requests: build an image workflow
generate an image

models.description: [Local] OCIO color convert. 1 EXR (or PNG) in -> 1 PNG out. Loads via bepic_imageLoad (OIIO), applies bepic_colorTransform input ACES - ACEScg to output Output - sRGB with clamp on, saves 16-bit PNG via bEpic_imageSave (OIIO). For batches of non-contiguous frames, run one job per file and patch image_path + first_frame; keep auto_version false so saves go straight into the target folder.
models.param_variability: single member - no cross-member variability to report
